extensionDescription.message: Copy images together with their source page or post link from websites and social platforms.

copyAllMenu.message: Copy all post images + post link

popupDescription.message: On any website, right-click an image to copy it with the current page link. X/Twitter and Weibo also support copying all images from a post.

stripFormattingDescription.message: Keep the images and URL, but copy the URL as plain text instead of a clickable link.

imageCopyFallback.message: Failed to copy image + link; copied only the source link.

identifyImageLinkFailed.message: Could not identify the image or source link.

identifyAlbumImageFailed.message: Could not identify the Weibo album image.

confirmPostLinkFailed.message: Could not confirm the post link for this image. Nothing was copied.

loadAllFailed.message: Could not load all images. Copy canceled.

confirmWeiboLinkFailed.message: Could not confirm the Weibo link for the current image.

openingSourcePost.message: Opening the source Weibo post and copying all images...

openSourceTabFailed.message: Could not open the source post in a new tab.

albumSingleOnly.message: Album thumbnail pages only support copying a single right-clicked image.

identifyContextImageFailed.message: Could not identify the right-clicked image.

sourceLoadFailed.message: Failed to load the source Weibo post. Nothing was copied.

sourceNoImages.message: No images found in the source Weibo post.

sourceCopyFailed.message: Failed to copy from the source Weibo post.
